---
title: "main.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\main.tsx"
loc: 6
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.75
style_score: 9.53
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 8.33
---

## Intent
The `main.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [*](file://react-dom/client)
- [App](file://./App.tsx)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
